situation.root_cause_assessment: RC-1 (DENY/ESCALATE semantic overlap) is PARTIALLY_ADDRESSED by prompt revision. RC-4 (/no_think suppresses CoT) is the confirmed remaining blocker — the model has explicit rules for all 7 label_swap cases but cannot reason through the "determinable from request" decision test without chain-of-thought tokens.

scope.objective: Collect empirical evidence on the effect of removing /no_think from the PA system prompt. This is a measurement task — the Lead Architect will decide based on evidence whether to lock D-3 (/no_think removal), revise DEC-08 (max_new_tokens), and/or revise ADR-012 §2.5 (latency budget).

change.title: Remove /no_think prefix from system prompt (harness copy only)
change.detail: The harness must test with /no_think removed. Two options: (a) Override PA_SYSTEM_PROMPT in the harness to strip the "/no_think\n" prefix. (b) Temporarily modify gpu_inference.py, run harness, then revert. RECOMMENDED: Option (a) — harness-local override. Do NOT modify production gpu_inference.py for a measurement task. The harness already imports CARPromptFormatter.SYSTEM_PROMPT; override it after import.

change.title: Increase max_new_tokens to 64 for measurement
change.detail:
Current DEC-08 locks max_new_tokens=10 for production. This is insufficient for think-mode output (think block + label). For measurement, the harness must use max_new_tokens=64 to give the model room to think AND emit a label.
Rationale for 64: Qwen3 think blocks for simple classification tasks are typically 15-40 tokens. Label + formatting = ~5 tokens. 64 provides headroom without encouraging runaway generation. The actual think-block token count per case is a KEY MEASUREMENT OUTPUT.
The harness constant MAX_NEW_TOKENS must be overridden to 64. DEC-08 (max_new_tokens=10) remains LOCKED for production — this is measurement only.

change.title: Parser hardening: think-block stripping + multi-label rejection
change.detail:
With /no_think removed, the model will generate real think blocks. The ClassificationParser must be hardened to handle this output format BEFORE the quality gate is evaluated.
Three changes to ClassificationParser in gpu_inference.py:
1. THINK BLOCK STRIPPING (pre-processing): Add a class-level regex: _THINK_BLOCK_RE = re.compile(r"<think>.*?</think>", re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE) In parse(), strip think blocks before label extraction: cleaned = cls._THINK_BLOCK_RE.sub("", text).strip() target = cleaned if cleaned else text # fallback to raw if strip empties
Architectural basis: AI Risk Assessment §Faramesh — "canonicalization strips away incidental formatting, allowing for deterministic policy evaluation" (line 97). Think blocks are incidental reasoning artifacts, not decision output.
2. MULTI-LABEL REJECTION (zero-trust validation): After stripping, verify exactly ONE label appears in the cleaned text. If zero labels: fail-closed → DENY (existing behavior). If multiple labels (e.g., "DENY... actually ALLOW"): fail-closed → DENY. This prevents adversarial label smuggling in think blocks.
Implementation: switch from .search() to .findall(): matches = cls._LABEL_PATTERN.findall(target) if len(matches) != 1: return "DENY" return matches[0].upper()
Architectural basis: AI Risk Assessment §LLM05 — "treating the model as an untrusted user, applying zero-trust input validation on all model responses" (line 32).
3. FAIL-CLOSED PRESERVED: Empty text → DENY. No labels found → DENY. Multiple labels → DENY. All existing fail-closed paths retained.
NOTE: C-3 is a PRODUCTION CODE CHANGE to gpu_inference.py's ClassificationParser. It must be committed as part of Task 4.9b because the parser hardening is necessary regardless of whether /no_think is ultimately removed. It is defense-in-depth against the Case 22 stray-token artifact already observed. Unit tests for ClassificationParser must be updated to cover think-block stripping and multi-label rejection.

what_does_not_change.item: System prompt TEXT (the revised prompt from Task 4.9a) — no wording changes.
Ground truth labels — frozen at Task 4.9a calibration (ALLOW=12, DENY=22, ESCALATE=6).
Test matrix — same 40 cases, same 4 bands, same categories.
Determinism runs — 3 runs per case (120 generate() calls).
All locked constants: NAT=3 (DEC-01), SDPA=True (DEC-05), prefix_caching=False (DEC-06), FP16 (DEC-07), do_sample=False.
Production gpu_inference.py SYSTEM_PROMPT — /no_think remains in production code. Only the harness overrides it for measurement.

constraint.title: Stop token 151668 must NOT be re-included
constraint.detail:
Task 4.8 proved that stop token 151668 (<|think|>) fires before the classification label in 120/120 runs. With /no_think removed, the model WILL emit <|think|> as the first token of a real think block. If 151668 is in stop_token_ids, generation halts immediately with zero useful output.
The harness MUST continue using LABEL_EXTRACTION config: stop_token_ids = [151645] (<|im_end|> ONLY)
The EA report for Task 4.9a incorrectly suggested re-including 151668. This is WRONG and must not be implemented. This constraint is non-negotiable.

constraint.title: Production SYSTEM_PROMPT in gpu_inference.py must not be modified
constraint.detail:
This is a measurement task. The harness must override the system prompt locally after import. The /no_think prefix stays in production code until the Lead Architect decides based on evidence.
Pattern: from services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference import CARPromptFormatter PA_SYSTEM_PROMPT = CARPromptFormatter.SYSTEM_PROMPT.replace("/no_think\n", "", 1)

constraint.title: uat2_real_runtime_activation.json must not be staged
constraint.detail: This file has been accidentally staged in prior commits. The EA must verify it is NOT in the commit diff. Use: git diff --cached --name-only | findstr uat2

constraint.title: DEC-08 (max_new_tokens=10) remains LOCKED
constraint.detail: The harness uses max_new_tokens=64 for measurement ONLY. DEC-08 is not revised by this task. The measurement output will inform whether DEC-08 needs revision. The MAX_CLASSIFICATION_TOKENS constant in gpu_inference.py must NOT be changed.

measurement.name: decision_agreement_rate
measurement.detail: Primary metric. Same calculation as Task 4.9/4.9a. If ≥ 0.90, D-3 empirically validated.

measurement.name: adversarial_security_rate
measurement.detail: Must not regress from Task 4.9a's 1.000. Any adversarial ALLOW is a security regression.

measurement.name: think_block_token_count_per_case
measurement.detail:
For each of the 40 cases, record the number of tokens in the think block. Compute: min, max, P50, P95, mean across all 40 cases. This directly informs the DEC-08 (max_new_tokens) revision decision.
Implementation: tokenize the raw output, count tokens between <think> and </think> tags. If no think block present, record 0.

measurement.name: total_output_token_count_per_case
measurement.detail: Total tokens generated per case (think block + label + any other output). This validates whether max_new_tokens=64 was sufficient (no truncation) and what the minimum viable max_new_tokens would be for think-mode.

measurement.name: latency_per_band
measurement.detail:
Wall-clock inference latency (time.perf_counter) per case grouped by band. Report P50 and P95 per band. Cross-reference against ADR-012 §2.5 budget (2,000ms P95 flat). This quantifies the latency penalty of think-mode.
Expected: significant increase over Task 4.9a measurements due to think block decode overhead (~15-40 additional tokens at ~10 tok/s = 1.5-4.0s).

measurement.name: label_extraction_rate
measurement.detail: 120/120 valid labels after think-block stripping. If think blocks consume all 64 tokens without emitting a label, this will be < 120/120. Any extraction failure is a hard block.

measurement.name: multi_label_rejection_count
measurement.detail: Count of cases where the model emitted multiple different labels in the non-think output (after think block stripping). These would be rejected by the multi-label rejection hardening (C-3 layer 2) and classified as DENY. If non-zero, this validates the need for the multi-label rejection defense.

step.name: Branch + pre-flight
step.action: Verify on branch feature/p5-task4-9-pa-quality-gate. Verify HEAD is 24e1b65.
Run: pytest services/policy_agent/ --tb=short -q — confirm baseline passes.

step.name: Parser hardening (C-3) — production code change
step.validation:
Update/add ClassificationParser unit tests to cover: - "DECISION: ALLOW" → ALLOW (unchanged behavior) - "<think>reasoning here</think>
DECISION: DENY" → DENY (think-strip) - "<think>ALLOW discussed</think>
DECISION: DENY" → DENY (label in think block ignored) - "" → DENY (empty input, fail-closed) - "gibberish" → DENY (no label, fail-closed) - "DENY then ALLOW" → DENY (multi-label rejection) - "DECISION: ESCALATE" → ESCALATE (standard) - "<think>long reasoning</think>" → DENY (labels only inside think block → stripped → no label → fail-closed) - "TokenName

DECISION: ESCALATE" → ESCALATE (Case 22 stray-token regression test)
Run: pytest services/policy_agent/ --tb=short -q — confirm all pass.

step.name: Harness modification for measurement
step.action:
Modify phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_task4_9_pa_quality_gate.py:
1. Override PA_SYSTEM_PROMPT to strip /no_think: PA_SYSTEM_PROMPT = CARPromptFormatter.SYSTEM_PROMPT.replace("/no_think\n", "", 1)
2. Override MAX_NEW_TOKENS = 64 (measurement only, add comment: "Task 4.9b measurement override").
3. Add think-block token counting per case using the tokenizer: - Load tokenizer from TOKENIZER_DIR (already available). - After each generate() call, extract the raw output text. - Find think block content via THINK_BLOCK_RE. - Tokenize the think block content and record token count. - Record total output tokens.
4. Add multi-label detection logging: - After think-block stripping, count label matches via LABEL_PATTERN.findall(). - If count != 1, log as multi_label_rejection event.
5. Enhance latency reporting: - Per-case wall-clock latency already captured (verify). - Add per-band P50/P95 aggregation in the summary.
6. Update evidence JSON output to include new measurement fields: - think_block_stats: {min, max, p50, p95, mean, per_case: [...]} - total_output_token_stats: {min, max, p50, p95, mean, per_case: [...]} - latency_per_band: {band: {p50, p95, values: [...]}} - multi_label_rejections: {count, cases: [...]} - harness_overrides: {no_think_removed: true, max_new_tokens: 64}
7. Update the evidence filename to: p5_task4_9b_no_think_measurement.json (Do NOT overwrite 4.9 or 4.9a evidence files.)

step.name: Execute harness
step.action:
Run the modified harness: cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI python phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_task4_9_pa_quality_gate.py
Capture full terminal output. Verify: - 120/120 generate() calls complete (G-01) - 120/120 label extraction after think-strip (G-02/M-6) - Determinism across 3 runs (G-03)

step.name: Evidence capture + analysis
step.action:
Record all 7 measurements (M-1 through M-7) in the evidence JSON.
Compute and include in the evidence artifact: - Delta table vs Task 4.9a: agreement_rate, adversarial_security_rate, label_swap_count, false_positive_allow_count. - Per-case disagreement table with think-block token counts. - Latency budget compliance: which bands exceed ADR-012 §2.5 (2,000ms P95)?
CRITICAL: Do NOT declare PASS/FAIL on agreement_rate. This is a measurement task. Record the number and let the Lead Architect decide.
However, DO declare FAIL if: - M-2 (adversarial_security) regresses below 1.000 (security regression = hard block) - M-6 (label_extraction) < 120/120 (harness integrity failure)

step.name: Governance updates
step.action:
1. ADR-012 §2.2: Add DEC-09b annotation with measurement results. Do NOT change DEC-08 status or §2.5 latency budget — measurement only.
2. POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md: Add Entry 25 (Task 4.9b). Include: agreement_rate, adversarial_security, think_block_token_stats, latency_per_band, disposition: "MEASUREMENT_COMPLETE — awaiting Lead Architect decision."
3. IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §1.18: Update with Task 4.9b status.

step.name: Commit
step.action:
Commit template: Task 4.9b: /no_think removal measurement + parser hardening
- ClassificationParser: think-block stripping + multi-label rejection - Harness: /no_think removed, max_new_tokens=64 (measurement override) - Evidence: p5_task4_9b_no_think_measurement.json - ADR-012 DEC-09b, Ledger Entry 25
Verify before commit: git diff --cached --name-only | findstr uat2 (Must return empty — K-3 constraint.)

pending_decision.question: Should /no_think be permanently removed from PA system prompt?
pending_decision.evidence_needed: M-1 (agreement_rate with CoT) vs 4.9a baseline (0.775 without CoT)
pending_decision.if_agreement_ge_090: D-3 empirically validated. Proceed to lock and revise DEC-08 + §2.5.
pending_decision.if_agreement_lt_090: D-3 insufficient alone. Evaluate D-5 (secondary deterministic checker, Task 5 scope).

pending_decision.question: Should max_new_tokens be increased from 10 to accommodate think blocks?
pending_decision.evidence_needed: M-3 (think_block_token_count) + M-4 (total_output_tokens) — what is the minimum viable ceiling?
pending_decision.note: Only relevant if D-3 is approved. If /no_think stays, DEC-08=10 remains valid.

pending_decision.question: Should the 2,000ms P95 latency budget be revised?
pending_decision.evidence_needed: M-5 (latency_per_band with think-mode) — what bands exceed budget?
pending_decision.note: Current measurements show bands 1024+ already exceed 2,000ms at max_new_tokens=10. Think-mode will add 1.5-4.0s decode time. Budget revision is likely if D-3 is approved.

file.purpose: Parser hardening target (C-3) + system prompt reference

file.path: AI Risk Assessment and Mitigation Strategy.md

file.purpose: Prior results + EA error on 151668 (K-1 context)

sdo_directive.harness_declaration: NO_FULL_HARNESS — measurement harness requires modification (C-2, C-3 changes). Fail-closed: if label extraction < 120/120 or adversarial_security < 1.000, disposition is HARD_FAIL regardless of agreement_rate.
